commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a durable subagent final-delivery state machine, retryability metadata, cleanup gating, restore/retry handling, and focused registry/announce tests for completion announce-back failures.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and linked logs, though not live-reproduced here: current main gives up after the announce retry budget and has no durable final-delivery terminal state, matching the linked retry-limit report. I did not run a long Gateway saturation reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-visible real behavior proof and normal maintainer review, not a narrow repair ClawSweeper can automate.
